title: Turkish-Style Dolma with Peanut Sauce
description: A twist on traditional dolma, this Mexican-inspired dish combines the flavors of Turkish dolma with the richness of peanut sauce. Perfect as an appetizer or snack.

ingredients.name: turkish dolma wrappers
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern grocery stores

instructions: In a large pan, heat 2 tbsp olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked rice, onion mixture, and spices.
Stuff each dolma wrapper with the rice mixture, leaving a small border around the edges.
Fold the top of each wrapper over the filling and secure with a toothpick.
In a separate pan, toast the peanuts over medium heat until fragrant, about 2-3 minutes.
Grind the toasted peanuts into a smooth sauce using a food processor or blender.
Serve the dolma with the peanut sauce for dipping.
